save_screenshot: save raw image bytes as a timestamped screenshot file for a given session ID
save_screenshot_from_file: copy an existing image file into the session screenshot store with an optional label
list_screenshots: list all screenshot files for a session sorted newest first by modification time
delete_session_screenshots: delete all screenshots for a session and return the count of files removed
encode_image: encode an image file as a base64 dict with media type for the vision pipeline
